title: T-017 — UI: pick_list_page + wave_builder_page + pick_detail_supervisor_page + modals (SHIP-012/013/014/016) (11-shipping-d)
prompt:
# T-017 — Pick + Wave UI pages + 4 modals

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §15.4 SHIP-012 Pick List List, §15.4 SHIP-013 Wave Picking Builder, §15.4 SHIP-014 Pick Desktop (Supervisor), §15.4 SHIP-016 Short Pick Resolve
UX: prototypes/design/11-SHIPPING-UX.md §3 SHIP-012/013/014/016
Prototypes:
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pick-screens.jsx:1-94 (pick_list_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pick-screens.jsx:98-184 (wave_builder_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pick-screens.jsx:217-330 (pick_detail_supervisor_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:455-502 (short_pick_resolve_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:538-562 (wave_release_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:564-575 (pick_reassign_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
3 RSC pages + 3 modals translated to shadcn primitives with parity to prototypes. Includes BL-SHIP-03 fix (Wave edit modal stub).

## Implementation contract
1. `/(shipping)/picks/page.tsx` — pick list table per pick_list_page prototype (cols: pick_list_number, type, status, priority, assigned_to, wave, started_at, progress %).
2. `/(shipping)/picks/waves/build/page.tsx` — wave_builder_page (kanban: available SOs / waves unreleased / released / in_pick / completed). Drag-and-drop via dnd-kit; SO chip moves between columns; calls `buildWave` / `releaseWave` Server Actions (T-016).
3. `/(shipping)/picks/[id]/page.tsx` — pick_detail_supervisor_page with per-line progress, reassign action, supervisor override path.
4. Modals:
   - `wave-release-modal.tsx` (modals.jsx:538-562) — confirms release; lists impacted SO numbers.
   - `short-pick-resolve-modal.tsx` (modals.jsx:455-502) — radio actions (backorder/partial/reallocate/cancel_line) + reason; calls T-016 resolveShortPick.
   - `pick-reassign-modal.tsx` (modals.jsx:564-575) — picker select + reason; calls T-016 reassignPicker.
   - BL-SHIP-03 fix: wave edit modal — backing edit modal added to unreleased kanban column.
5. Permission gates: `ship.so.confirm` for Wave Build/Release; `ship.pick.execute` for individual picker views.
6. Four states per page + i18n keys `shipping.picks.*`, `shipping.waves.*`.

## Prototype parity
Verify each page + modal against prototype line ranges above. Do not paste JSX wholesale.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/picks/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/picks/_components/pick-list-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/picks/waves/build/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/picks/waves/build/_components/wave-builder-kanban.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/picks/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/picks/[id]/_components/pick-supervisor-view.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_modals/wave-release-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_modals/wave-edit-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_modals/short-pick-resolve-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_modals/pick-reassign-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/picks/__tests__/pick-list-table.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/picks/__tests__/wave-builder-kanban.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/picks/__tests__/pick-supervisor-view.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/en/shipping.json [modify]
- apps/web/messages/pl/shipping.json [modify]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pick-screens.jsx [ref]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the pick_list_page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pick-screens.jsx:1-94, then header + filter row + 8-col table + pagination match — RTL + Playwright screenshot.
2. Given wave_builder_page renders, when compared to pick-screens.jsx:98-184, then 4-column kanban (available SOs / waves unreleased / released / in_pick / completed — but render 4 visible at a time per prototype) + DnD chips + Edit stub on unreleased now has backing wave-edit-modal (BL-SHIP-03 fix).
3. Given pick_detail_supervisor_page renders, when compared to pick-screens.jsx:217-330, then per-line table + supervisor reassign action + progress bar.
4. Given short_pick_resolve_modal opens, when user selects action='backorder' and submits, then resolveShortPick (T-016) is called and the table row updates.
5. UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL specs per page + modal interactions + Server Action invocation + permission gate.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run shipping/picks`.
- Playwright `apps/web/e2e/shipping-pick-flow.spec.ts` covers list → wave-build → release → supervisor view.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not perpetuate BL-SHIP-03 (wave edit stub).
- Do not regress accessibility (DnD keyboard nav required per axe).
- Do not implement scanner UI here (06-SCANNER-P1 owns SHIP-015 pick scanner per §15.2).

pipeline_inputs.description: Pick list + wave builder + pick detail supervisor + 3 modals (wave-release, short-pick-resolve, pick-reassign) + BL-SHIP-03 wave-edit fix.
pipeline_inputs.details: DnD via dnd-kit with keyboard nav. Wave builder kanban renders 4 visible columns (unreleased / released / in_pick / completed). BL-SHIP-03 fix: add wave-edit-modal backing the Edit stub.
out_of_scope: Do not build scanner pick UI (06-SCANNER-P1 owns).

Given wave_builder_page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pick-screens.jsx:98-184, then kanban + DnD chips + Edit stub match prototype layout.

Given pick_detail_supervisor_page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pick-screens.jsx:217-330, then per-line table + reassign action + short_pick_resolve_modal trigger match; AND given action='backorder' submit, when resolveShortPick succeeds, then table row updates.
UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.
